## Problem

A clear description of the problem or gap this feature would address.

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see implemented and how it should work.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Any other context, mockups, or references that help explain the request.
